prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Evo4 (DNPA)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 420 HP and 520 Nm with a **Garrett GT2867R Gen II** turbocharger, **MagnaFlow 304 stainless steel cat-back exhaust** with 3.5" dual outlets, and **034 Motorsport billet aluminum intercooler upgrade** (PN: 034-1000030) to reduce intake temps by 25°C under full boost

KW Suspensions **Clubsport coilovers** (PN: 35231001) with **3-way adjustable damping**, **15mm front/10mm rear lowering**, and **helper springs** for the Arteon’s MQB-derived **380mm front brake kit** (PN: 5Q0 615 301 AA), paired with **Pagid RSC3000 brake pads** and **ATE Type 200 DOT 4 brake fluid** for fade resistance under Nürburgring lap conditions

034 Motorsport **Engine Mount Inserts (75A durometer)** (PN: 034-101-2005) and **Dogbone Mount (85A durometer)** (PN: 034-101-2001) to eliminate EA888 Evo4 torque steer, combined with a **Neuspeed P-Flo Carbon Fiber driveshaft** (PN: NSP-FL-010) to handle the increased power delivery without NVH compromise
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (PN: RB-VW-ARTEON-03) with **custom 3M Gloss Black wrap** on the fenders, extending the rear arches by 50mm to fit **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET45 wheels** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 R19)** for a 5mm flush fitment

**VMR Carbon Fiber front splitter** (PN: VMR-VW-ARTEON-01) with **integrated canards** and **custom LED DRL delete** (replaced with **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes**), paired with a **Maxton Design rear diffuser** (PN: MA-VW-ARTEON-SB-02) and **custom 3D-printed active aero flaps** (controlled via **Motec M150 ECU**) for adjustable downforce

**Forge Motorsport aluminum oil cap** (PN: FMMOC-EA888) and **custom CNC-machined aluminum coolant expansion tank** (PN: 034-101-1001) with **anodized blue accents**, matched to a **full interior carbon fiber trim kit** (steering wheel, door cards, and center console) from **Eurokraft (PN: EK-VW-ARTEON-CF-INT)**
